title: Started engineering college
description: Joined MAIT for ECE. Started building apps for final-year students.

title: Dropped out. Started building.
description: Left college, launched unstudious.com, moved to 91 Springboard coworking space. First job as founding engineer at SquadRun.

title: Founded Unstudious
description: EdTech venture tackling book piracy. Got attention from Matrix Partners and Tracxn.

title: Joined Paytm
description: Software Engineer on seller dashboard backend, then promoted to Growth Engineer working on deep-linking and price comparison.

title: Went independent
description: Left Paytm, started contracting. React, React Native, blockchain projects. Joined G2i vetting platform.

title: Deep into crypto
description: Built Steem blockchain commenting system, Komodo/Zcash wallet, card trading apps. Started exploring Web3.

title: Joined Pei. Built Bitcharge.
description: Started 4-year contract with Pei (payment fintech). Launched Bitcharge v1 crypto payments platform. 195 users.

title: Founded Droidsize
description: Registered Droidsize Technologies as a product development and consulting studio with Neeraj Kumar.

title: Polkadot ecosystem
description: Received Kusama Treasury grants for Speck Wallet and Extrinsics.io. Entered Polkadot developer community.

title: Flex (peak income), then pivot
description: Post-acquisition role at Flex at $15k/month. Laid off after 8 months. Chose startups over returning to employment.

title: Founded Charge23 Labs
description: Incorporated Chargespot EV charging venture. DPIIT recognized, incubated at AIC Sangam. Team of 5.

title: Relaycode W3F Grant
description: Web3 Foundation grant merged for Relaycode — modern Polkadot developer tooling. Redemption arc for earlier incomplete grants.

title: Claude Code era
description: Started using AI agents extensively. GitHub output dramatically increased. Shipped Collective Domains, Merry Magic Mail (Product Hunt).

title: Building in public
description: Shipped Relaycode M2, building itsyogesh.fyi, competing at Polkadot hackathons with Unlockd.
